intent: Log in as problem_user and browse the catalogue. Product images should load and checkout fields should accept input.
step: Type a first and last name into the checkout form
observed_behavior: The first name field accepts text, but the last name field clears itself on every keystroke and stays empty, so checkout cannot proceed.
agent_reasoning: I typed 'Smith' into Last Name repeatedly and the value never persisted. The field appears to reject input.
